facts.claim: Just like a delicious cake, your ship is made of layers. Find out which fun ingredients — staterooms, dining, activities — go into each deck.
Carnival Luminosa is a cruise ship operated by Carnival Cruise Line.
Originally built as Costa Luminosa, the ship entered service on 5 May 2009.
Costa Luminosa departed Civitavecchia, Italy, on 3 June 2009, on her 13-night maiden voyage, with ports of call in Savona, Saint-Tropez, Barcelona, Lisbon, Le Havre and Amsterdam.
